# Calalloo
> The Pinterest of Caribbean food. Discover, save, and explore Caribbean recipes with a beautiful visual interface. Location-aware recipe discovery for food lovers.

## About
- **Category:** App - Food
- **URL:** https://priscadezigns.org/calalloo/
- **Keywords:** Caribbean food, recipes, Caribbean cooking, food discovery, Caribbean cuisine

## What We Offer
The Pinterest of Caribbean food. Discover, save, and explore Caribbean recipes with a beautiful visual interface. Location-aware recipe discovery for food lovers.
